summary: Completed COMPREHENSIVE e2e testing of Villa Paris Gestionale. All 16 features tested and PASS. The app is ready for user presentation.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height=-1 on initial load (non-blocking, charts render correctly)

test_credentials: None required - SQLite database at prisma/prisma/dev.db
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 79 events, 92 clients. Event ID 37 'C18 Lara' used for modifica-evento tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. PDF download generates valid PDF (v6 created during test). Excel export generates valid XLSX. Notifiche dropdown working. All CRUD operations verified.

1_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with real data: 92 clienti, 79 eventi, €15,200 ricavi stimati

2_calendario_year_picker.details: Calendar shows events on correct dates (Jan 2026), year picker (2024-2030) works, events color-coded by type

3_appuntamento_rapido.details: Modal opens on empty date click, has canale contatto buttons (Telefono/Mail/Matrimonio.com/Social/Passaparola/Altro)

4_clienti_list.details: List loads with 92 clients, search works (tested 'Lara' - returned 1 result)

5_clienti_form.details: Client form has canale contatto buttons and tipo cliente dropdown, save works

6_nuovo_evento.details: 6 canale contatto buttons visible, 2 client sections (Festeggiato/a + 2 Contatto opzionale), Sposo auto-shows for Matrimonio

7_modifica_evento_dateProposte.details: Event 37 loads with dateProposte visible as '03/01/2026' badge, Aggiungi Data button present, dates can be removed

8_modifica_evento_save.details: Changed personePreviste from 70 to 75 and saved successfully - '✅ Evento salvato con successo!' message shown

9_pdf_download.details: Stampa modal opens, clicked 'Genera PDF Cliente (BOZZA)', downloaded VillaParis_C18_Lara_Cliente_v6.pdf (32KB valid PDF)

10_notifiche_bell.details: Bell icon click opens dropdown panel showing upcoming events: 'Prove Menu tra 5 giorni', 'Arangiaro charter pranzo tra 12 giorni'

11_report_azienda.details: Page loads with 40 Eventi, 5,066 Ospiti, €405,280 Ricavi, 4 charts (Ricavi/Eventi/Ospiti per Mese, Eventi per Tipo)

12_excel_download.details: Scarica Excel button present, API /api/report/azienda.xlsx returns valid XLSX (19KB), confirmed PK header

13_menu_base.details: Page loads showing empty state 'Nessun menu base creato' with Nuovo Menu button

14_impostazioni.details: NOT a placeholder - has Dati Azienda (Nome/P.IVA/Indirizzo), Documenti PDF settings, Notifiche config

15_console_errors.details: No React errors. Only Recharts dimension warnings on Report page (non-blocking)

16_api_endpoints.details: GET /api/eventi (79 events), GET /api/clienti (92 clients), GET /api/report/stats?year=2026 (40 events), GET /api/report/azienda.xlsx (200 OK)

api_verification.GET_api_eventi: 200 OK - returns 79 events with clienti relations
api_verification.GET_api_eventi_id_37: 200 OK - returns C18 Lara with dateProposte and versioni
